title: List Workloads
content:
# List Workloads

Returns a list of Workload objects. The list can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.

## Endpoint

`GET /workloads/list`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.deprecated_workload.listLegacyWorkloads()
print(response)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search and filter on the list based on the keys `name`, `title` (Display Name), `app_name`, `cluster_name` and `node_name`. All strings in the array are treated as `OR`. The search is case insensitive and will find partial matches as well.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `app_name`. The filter is on the full name only. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

parameters.name: app_version
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `app_version`. The filter is on the full value only. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

parameters.name: acp_name
parameters.description: [`Deprecated`] A filter on the list based on the key `acp_name`. The filter is on the full name only. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

parameters.name: cluster_name
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `cluster_name`. The filter is on the full name only. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters. If set, it will override acp_name

parameters.name: node_name
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `node_name`. The filter is on the full name only. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

parameters.name: workload_name
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `name`. The filter is on the full name only. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on the key `status` (start/stop function in Kelvin UI) of the Workloads.

parameters.name: asset_name
parameters.description: A filter on the list based on Asset `name` associated with the Workload. The filter is on the full name only. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

parameters.name: staged
parameters.description: A filter on the key staged. Using true will only show staged workloads, false will show all workloads.
